description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust, dark metallic frame. The grip is made of a wood-textured material, ergonomically curved for comfortable handling. The barrel is round and extends significantly from the main body, with a front sight post visible at the muzzle. The cylinder, which holds ammunition, is prominent and features multiple chambers, typical of revolver designs. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a simple, curved trigger. The hammer is exposed at the rear, allowing for manual cocking, and the overall finish is a combination of matte black metal and polished brown wood.
description: A classic revolver-style firearm with a long black barrel, wooden grip, and exposed hammer. The design features a rounded trigger guard and a prominent ammunition cylinder.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, wooden grip, and the exposed hammer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, grip, and the profile of the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the top of the hammer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
